facebook.caption:
4.9 stars. 982 reviews. For a gift shop. That number doesn't lie.

LOCA - Night Market on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is where you pick up souvenirs that don't look like every other airport grab. Nearly 1,000 people rated this place and almost all of them gave it full marks. That's rare anywhere, let alone a shop.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: 982 people gave this Phu Quoc gift shop 4.9 stars. Watch what's inside LOCA - Night Market on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo and you'll see exactly why the rating holds up.
